mcqs.question: Which cloud characteristic allows users to provision computing resources without human interaction with the provider?
mcqs.explanation: On-Demand Self-Service allows users to provision resources automatically through a portal or API without needing to contact the provider's support team.

mcqs.question: The ability of cloud resources to scale up during peak demand and scale down during low demand is called:
mcqs.explanation: Rapid Elasticity enables automatic scaling of resources based on demand, allowing systems to handle traffic spikes and reduce costs during low usage.

mcqs.question: In resource pooling, customers typically:

options.text: Know exactly which physical server their VM runs on
Have no control over resource location at any level
May specify location at a higher level (region/zone) but not exact physical location

mcqs.explanation: In resource pooling, customers generally don't know the exact physical location of resources, but may specify location at a higher abstraction level like region or availability zone.

mcqs.question: Which characteristic ensures transparent billing based on actual resource consumption?
mcqs.explanation: Measured Service provides metering capabilities that track resource usage, enabling pay-per-use billing and transparency in costs.

mcqs.question: Horizontal scaling (scaling out) means:

options.text: Increasing the size of existing instances
Adding more instances to handle load

mcqs.explanation: Horizontal scaling (scale out) adds more instances to distribute load. Vertical scaling (scale up) increases the size/power of existing instances.
